calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Continued To Oct-26-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Daniel Okon.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Recorded by "For The Record."

Nils Rosenquest, Esq. and David Wasserman, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs University President Associates, L.P., a California limited partnership, and Denise Marie, an individual.
Chris Dressel, Owner and General Partner of University President Associates, L.P., was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Rosenquest, Wasserman and Dressel all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Daniel Okon.

Plaintiffs' Complaint for Civil Rights Violations (Bane Act) and Assault was filed on April 30, 2020, and personally served on defendant Daniel Okon on May 22, 2021.
Default as to defendant Daniel Okon was enteredon April 1, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 10, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs University President Associates, L.P., a California limited partnership, and Denise Marie, an individual, and against the defaulted defendant Daniel Okon, as follows:

Damages - $15,375.00.
Costs - $630.00.

Total - $16,005.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Continued To Aug-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Daniel Okon.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855. Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com.

Nils C. Rosenquest, Esq. and David Wasserman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University President Associates LP, a California limited partnership.
Denise Marie and Chris Dressel, witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Rosenquest, Wasserman and Dressel, along with Ms. Marie, appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Daniel Okon.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Assault and Civil Rights Violations - Bane Act, was filed on April 30, 2020, and personally served on defendant Daniel Okon on May 22, 2020.
Default as to defendant Daniel Okon was entered on April 1, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 10, 2021.

After hearing testimony from the witnesses Denise Marie and Chris Dressel, the Court CONTINUES this matter for further default prove-up hearing and instructs counsel to provide the Court with a written brief on Civil Rights Violations in accordance with the Bane Act, and a supplemental declaration itemizing Special Damages. Specifically, counsel shall itemize plaintiff's costs incurred due to its inability to rent the Unit in question at the subject premises located 900 Chestnut Street, San Francisco, CA. The brief and supplemental declaration shall be submitted to the Court no later than close of business on Thursday, August 12, 2021.

Matter is CONTINUED to Thursday, August 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514. Plaintiff to provide defendant with notice of the continued hearing date.
